feed.title: Bala Avulapati
feed.subtitle: Writing on systems-level work, open source, and peer-to-peer networking.

entry.title: One core, many platforms
entry.summary: A completely native Mac and iPhone app that syncs peer-to-peer with no server - and the single shared core behind it. Bare does the P2P and gets out of the way.

entry.title: Swift peers in the bare RPC ecosystem
entry.summary: Four packages that let the same spec generating your JS code also generate Swift - typed structs, binary codecs, and a full HRPC peer class.
